feedback_intro: Tell us what happened and include the page context. The team reviews feedback in Concierge admin and follows up from there.
feedback_category_bug_desc: Something broke, looks wrong, or blocked your work.
feedback_category_idea_desc: A workflow improvement or feature request.
feedback_category_question_desc: Something was unclear or needs follow-up.
feedback_message_placeholder: Describe what you expected, what happened, and any details that would help us reproduce it.
feedback_context_note: We include the current page and browser details with your feedback.
feedback_screenshot_empty: Add a screenshot when the visual state matters.
feedback_context_detail: Your feedback will include this page URL and browser details so the team can investigate faster.
admin_feedback_description: Review submitted product feedback, inspect context, and mark items resolved after follow-up.
admin_feedback_select: Select a feedback item to view details.

Personalize your AI assistant by setting: Personalize your AI assistant by setting its name, choosing the AI model style, and enabling custom entities for specialized tasks.
You can customize your interactions with: You can customize your interactions with the AI assistant by giving it things to remember. You can enter plain text or something more structured like JSON or XML. If you allow it, the AI will periodically modify its own memory to improve its ability to assist you.

help_desc_getting_started: Learn the main areas of Concierge and the fastest way to start.
help_desc_using_chat: Start chats, attach files, manage history, and handle large conversations.
help_desc_creating_using_applets: Create, open, and manage Concierge applets and applet-scoped files.
help_desc_working_with_media: Upload, browse, preview, and attach files with scoped file access.
help_desc_using_automations: Create scheduled AI workflows, review run history, and pin generated HTML results.
help_desc_using_skills: Create reusable instructions and supporting files that Concierge can load in chat.
help_desc_managing_profile_settings: Adjust account, assistant, language, theme, and memory preferences.
help_desc_keyboard_shortcuts: Use core keyboard shortcuts and productivity habits.
mcp_dialog_description: Connect custom MCP servers so Concierge can use external tools and data in context.
mcp_custom_servers_description: Add any MCP-compatible server with a bearer token or OAuth flow.
mcp_custom_oauth_hint: For OAuth, leave the token blank and use Add & connect OAuth.
skills_dialog_description: Create reusable instructions and supporting files that Concierge can load when they match a request.
No custom skills yet. Create one to teac: No custom skills yet. Create one to teach the AI your workflows.
Delete skill \"{{name}}\"? This will rem: Delete skill "{{name}}"? This will remove all skill files and cannot be undone.
SKILL.md is managed automatically — use: SKILL.md is managed automatically - use the content field instead
Name must be lowercase letters, numbers,: Name must be lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
Name: Name
The AI uses this description to decide w: The AI uses this description to decide when to load the skill.
skill_description_limit_guidance: Only the first {{max}} characters are stored as the load-time summary. Extra wording is added to the top of SKILL.md automatically on save.
# My Skill - Instructions and best pract: # My Skill - Instructions and best practices...
help_desc_using_connectors: Connect custom MCP servers so Concierge can use external tools and data.
portal_dialog_description: Manage profile settings, AI assistant preferences, memory, connectors, skills, and secrets.
Secrets are encrypted and stored securel: Secrets are encrypted and stored securely. They are injected as environment variables into your workspace.
Store API keys and tokens securely. Secr: Store API keys and tokens securely. Secrets are encrypted and available as environment variables in your workspace.
Secrets save could not be verified. The: Secrets save could not be verified. The editor was reloaded with the current server state.
portal_discover_slash_hint: Type these commands in chat to jump here quickly.
auth_error_slack_not_configured_descript: Slack OAuth is missing required server settings. Add the Slack client ID and client secret, then try connecting again.
auth_error_atlassian_not_configured_desc: Atlassian OAuth is missing required server settings. Add the Atlassian client ID and client secret, then try connecting again.
auth_error_unauthorized_description: Sign in before connecting this service.
auth_error_oauth_failed_description: The authorization flow did not complete. Try connecting again from Connectors.
auth_error_access_denied_description: The service did not grant access. Start the connection again when you are ready.
auth_error_generic_description: The service connection could not be completed.
content_too_long_paste: Pasted text is {{actual}} characters, which exceeds the maximum of {{max}} characters.
content_too_long_truncated: Your input reached {{actual}} characters and was shortened to {{max}} characters.
Deleting this saved version cannot be un: Deleting this saved version cannot be undone. Later versions will be renumbered.
Clearing Draft discards the current Draf: Clearing Draft discards the current Draft and restores the latest saved version when one exists.

Waiting for the server to finish writing: Waiting for the server to finish writing the message
The server is still running. We lost the: The server is still running. We lost the live connection, but we will show the response here as soon as it finishes saving.
Stopped waiting for the live response: Stopped waiting for the live response
Stopped generating the response. You can: Stopped generating the response. You can continue the conversation from here.

mcp_preset_atlassian_desc: Search, create, and update JIRA issues and Confluence pages. Connect to your Atlassian Cloud site.
mcp_preset_slack_desc: Search messages, channels, and users in your Slack workspace.
mcp_preset_github_desc: Manage repositories, issues, pull requests, and code on GitHub.
atlassian_oauth_connected: Atlassian connected. You can close this window.
Popup blocked. Allow popups to connect {: Popup blocked. Allow popups to connect {{service}}.
OAuth window was closed before completin: OAuth window was closed before completing.
Run Concierge automatically on a schedul: Run Concierge automatically on a schedule.
Configure the schedule, instructions, su: Configure the schedule, instructions, supporting files, and output.
Use 0 for the top of the hour.
Pin latest HTML result to sidebar: Pin latest HTML result to sidebar
Create scheduled AI workflows with files: Create scheduled AI workflows with files, history, and optional HTML output.
tool_display_ListAutomations_desc: Lists automations and their schedule/output settings.
tool_display_ReadAutomation_desc: Reads one automation, including AUTOMATION.md and supporting file metadata.
tool_display_CreateAutomation_desc: Creates a scheduled AI automation with instructions, schedule, and optional HTML output.
tool_display_UpdateAutomation_desc: Updates automation configuration, instructions, schedule, HTML output, or sidebar pinning.
tool_display_RunAutomation_desc: Starts a manual automation run through the task worker.
tool_display_DeleteAutomation_desc: Deletes an automation and its stored files after a clear user request.
tool_display_ViewAutomationHtml_desc: Opens an automation's latest or historical rendered HTML output.
tool_display_SubmitFeedback_desc: Sends product feedback to the Concierge team, optionally with an existing attached image.
tool_display_OpenCanvasFile_desc: Opens a workspace HTML file or file reference in the canvas as an article, applet, or generic preview.
tool_display_CreateArticle_desc: Creates an article workspace path and opens it in the canvas editor.
tool_display_CreateApplet_desc: Creates a new interactive HTML applet from a prompt or registers an existing workspace HTML file.
tool_display_ListApplets_desc: Lists applets with IDs, Draft paths, and publish status.
tool_display_GetApplet_desc: Reads one applet record with Draft path, saved versions, publish state, and app-store state.
tool_display_GetAppletState_desc: Shows applet Draft, saved version, published version, and recommended next action.
tool_display_OpenAppletDraft_desc: Opens the mutable Draft workspace file in the canvas without copying a saved version over it.
tool_display_SaveAppletDraftAsVersion_de: Snapshots the current applet Draft as a new immutable version without publishing.
tool_display_PublishAppletVersion_desc: Publishes an immutable applet version, snapshotting Draft first when no version is specified.
tool_display_DeleteAppletVersion_desc: Deletes one saved applet version after confirmation without deleting Draft or the applet.
tool_display_UpdateAppletMetadata_desc: Updates applet name, Draft link, or app-store metadata without changing Draft/version content.
tool_display_UnpublishApplet_desc: Clears the directly published applet version without deleting Draft or saved versions.
tool_display_GetAppletVersionSource_desc: Reads storage metadata for one immutable applet version without returning the full HTML or changing Draft.
tool_display_CopyAppletVersionToDraft_de: Copies one immutable saved version into the editable Draft workspace file.
tool_display_DeleteApplet_desc: Deletes an applet after user confirmation. Uses the active canvas applet if no ID is passed.
tool_display_GetCanvasState_desc: Returns a lightweight active canvas tab state without a screenshot.
notification_delete_confirm_description: Are you sure you want to delete this notification? This action cannot be undone.
